name: plccopilot
description: PLC Copilot monorepo — vendor-neutral compiler + per-backend codegen packages.

scripts.schemas:check: pnpm cli:build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js schema --check packages/cli/schemas
scripts.build:packages-vendor: pnpm --filter @plccopilot/codegen-codesys build && pnpm --filter @plccopilot/codegen-rockwell build && pnpm --filter @plccopilot/codegen-siemens build
scripts.ci:contracts: pnpm build:packages-base && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-base-dist.mjs && pnpm build:packages-vendor && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-vendor-dist.mjs && pnpm cli:build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js schema --check packages/cli/schemas && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-cli-dist.mjs && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-cli-pack.mjs && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-cli-tarball.mjs && node packages/cli/scripts/smoke-consumer-install.mjs && node packages/cli/scripts/release-plan.mjs --check && node packages/cli/scripts/release-plan.mjs --pack-dry-run && node packages/cli/scripts/release-publish-dry-run.mjs && node packages/cli/scripts/publish-audit.mjs --check
scripts.ci: pnpm ci:contracts && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test
